prompt: Ultra-wide cinematic cover banner (21:9). A cover image for the chapter "Journey Inside the Atom": instruments, light and the spirit of scientific discovery, themed around the chapter's subject. Dark, atmospheric, cinematic, painterly illustration, no text overlay.
alt: Journey Inside the Atom — chapter cover

prompt: Hand-drawn coloured educational diagram — clean, elegant. Visible ink line work with soft hand-painted colour fills (coloured-pencil / gouache feel). Deep charcoal near-black background; warm muted colours; no neon, no glow, no bright flashy colours, no 3D-render look. 4:3. A beam of small particles travelling from the left toward a column of atoms, each drawn with a tiny dense central nucleus; most paths pass straight through, a few bend at angles, and one rebounds backward after striking a nucleus. Neat hand-lettered labels: 'Alpha particles', 'Gold foil', 'Nucleus', 'Deflected particle'. Calm and uncluttered.
alt: The gold-foil experiment: alpha particles hitting gold foil, most passing through, some deflected, a few bouncing back off the tiny nucleus
